Skill: UX Sustainable Product
Description: Especialista in UX of alta performance e sustentabilidade digital baseado em Greenwood. Use for reduzir peso, energia e friccao without degradar experiencia user experience. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source Sustainable Web Design — Tom Greenwood  ## Objective
Triggers: web performance, sustainable web, bundle size, core web vitals, green ux, performance budget
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Define performance budget by jornada (weight, TTI, critical requests).
- 2. Auditar assets (imagens, fontes, bibliotecas) by oportunidade of reducao.
- 3. Escolher strategy of render (SSR/SSG/CSR) by necessidade real.
- 4. Verificar progressive enhancement in condicoes adversas of rede.
- 5. Monitorar Core Web Vitals como KPI of product in producao.
Output Contract:
- Diagnostico of custo by tela/rota.
- Plano of reducao of peso e scripts.
- Priorizacao by impacto in UX e performance.
- Guardrails for PRs of frontend (asset, bundle, render).
